content.problemStatement:
You are given an integer array of length NNN.

For each index iii, construct a new array such that the value at position iii
is equal to the product of all elements of the array except AiA_iAi​.

Formally, compute an array PPP such that

Pi=∏j≠iAjP_i = \prod_{j \ne i} A_jPi​=j=i∏​Aj​
Input Format

The first line contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers
A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.


Output Format
Print NNN space-separated integers representing the array
P1,P2,…,PNP_1, P_2, \dots, P_NP1​,P2​,…,PN​.
constraints: The sum of N over all test cases does not exceed 100000
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the size of the array. The second line contains N space‑separated integers A1, A2, …, AN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line with N space‑separated integers P1, P2, …, PN where Pi is the product of all array elements except Ai.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Total product = 2*3*4*5*6 = 720. Each Pi = total product / Ai, giving the listed values.
Products excluding each element: for 1 -> 2*3=6, for 2 -> 1*3=3, for 3 -> 1*2=2.
There is a single zero at position 3. All positions except the zero get product 0. The zero position gets product of the other three numbers: -1*1*-3 = 3.

solution.approach: For each test case compute two auxiliary arrays: prefix[i] = product of A[0..i‑1] and suffix[i] = product of A[i+1..N‑1]. The answer for position i is prefix[i] * suffix[i]. This can be done in O(N) time with O(N) extra space (or O(1) extra if we overwrite the answer array). The method works for zeros and negative numbers without using division.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, total O(sum of N) across all test cases.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N) for the answer array (prefix and suffix are computed on the fly).

code.Python3:
import sys

def solve():
    data = list(map(int, sys.stdin.read().strip().split()))
    if not data:
        return
    it = iter(data)
    T = next(it)
    out_lines = []
    for _ in range(T):
        N = next(it)
        arr = [next(it) for _ in range(N)]
        ans = [1] * N
        pref = 1
        for i in range(N):
            ans[i] = pref
            pref *= arr[i]
        suff = 1
        for i in range(N - 1, -1, -1):
            ans[i] *= suff
            suff *= arr[i]
        out_lines.append(' '.join(map(str, ans)))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out_lines))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
